frothy fetch — resolve git deps into the local cache (stub; not yet wired)

Fetch resolves git dependencies declared in frothy.toml into the local cache so build can find them offline. It is a stub today: the dependency resolver is not yet wired, and running it prints a message saying so. The verb exists so projects that depend on it can be written against the final shape.

Examples:
  frothy fetch
      attempt to resolve git deps (prints not-wired notice today)

Flags:
  -project string
    	project directory containing frothy.toml (default ".")
